2006Est. Ota, Ogun State

Who We Are

Building Careers & Character Since 2006

Career Builder Schools is a Government-Approved institution located at 3, Alabaja Street, Iyedi-Titun, Ota, Ogun State. Since our founding in 2006, we have been committed to raising confident, capable, and independent young Nigerians.

Our motto — "Independent Tomorrow" — drives everything we do. We believe every student deserves an education that sets them free to build their own future.

🏛️

Government Approved

Fully accredited by Nigerian educational authorities.

💻

ICT Computer Lab

Dedicated computer lab with laptops for hands-on digital skills training.

🛝

Playground & Sports

Outdoor play equipment and sports facilities for physical development.

👨‍🏫

Qualified Teachers

Experienced, caring educators committed to every student's success.

Get in Touch

What We Offer

Our Academic Programs

Quality education from early childhood through to senior secondary school.

Enroll Today
🎈

Nursery & Pre-School

Play-based learning that nurtures curiosity and early social skills for ages 2–5.

📚

Primary School

Strong foundations in literacy, numeracy, sciences and the arts for ages 6–11.

🔬

Junior Secondary (JSS)

Broad curriculum preparing students for BECE and further education.

🏆

Senior Secondary (SSS)

WAEC & NECO preparation with career and university counseling.

💻

ICT & Technology

Hands-on computer training and digital literacy for the modern world.

⚽

Sports & Co-Curricular

Football, athletics, cultural activities, debate and leadership programs.

Join Our Community

Simple Admissions Process

We welcome motivated students at all levels. Come visit us or call to get started today.

1

Get Application Form

Visit our office or call 08039404776 / 08060581513 to request your form.

2

Submit Documents

Completed form, birth certificate, previous report cards, and passport photos.

3

Entrance Assessment

Sit for a short entrance test in English and Mathematics.

4

Parent Interview

Successful applicants and parents meet briefly with our admissions team.

5

Welcome to CBS!

Receive your offer, pay fees, collect uniform and begin your journey!

Fill Admission Form

📞 08039404776  |  08060581513  |  [email protected]
